creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 212954
patch to update the port

- update 0.51_1 -> 0.52
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/release/MRSCOTTY/Crypt-X509-0.52
- LICENSE is UNKNOWN, but poudriere is not happy about this value,
	so commented it out.
- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p2 amd64
poudriere 3.3.3
perl 5.30.2
pkg 1.13.2
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say PASS.
